filter_note: Gaussian spectral low-pass w(k)=exp(-(k/(K-1))^2/(2 s^2)); s>>1 disables
ic: Li-Shu-Yang: u0=840 exp(-84|x|^2), v0=420 exp(-42|x|^2), mass 10*pi each
reference_note: PARTICLE-FIELD LDG-STYLE comparison: core-adaptive PERIODIC/WINDOW Fourier reconstruction, NOT a strict Neumann method-to-method LDG benchmark. Same initial condition and reporting times as the Li-Shu-Yang LDG study. Boundary effects are negligible over the very short reporting times because the Gaussian stays far from the window edge (concentrated mass never reaches |y| ~ pi).
